parsedJson.summary: Mid-2010s template design with strong phone visibility but cluttered navigation, compressed hero image, and competing visual elements that dilute primary actions.

issues.title: Hero image compressed and distorted with unnatural proportions
issues.what_observed: The main hero image showing a brick house with roof work is vertically compressed to roughly 200-250px height, making the house appear flattened and unnatural. The image aspect ratio is severely distorted.
issues.why_problem: When a local searcher lands from Google, a squashed photo signals amateur DIY work or a business that doesn't invest in quality presentation. The distortion makes visitors question whether the actual roofing work will be equally careless. In 8 seconds, they'll bounce to a competitor with professional imagery.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Full-height hero section (minimum 500px on desktop) with a properly proportioned, high-resolution image of completed roof restoration work. The image should use its natural 16:9 or 3:2 ratio, showing clear before/after or an authentic team-on-site photo.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace with full-bleed hero section using min-height: 60vh, object-fit: cover on a high-quality 1920x1080+ photo. Remove the red overlay filter to let authentic imagery build trust naturally.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图被压扁了,房子看起来很不自然。这让客户觉得你的生意不专业。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索访客在8秒内决定是否信任您的公司。压扁的照片会让70%的移动访客直接返回Google选择竞争对手,因为他们认为施工质量也会这样马虎。

issues.title: Eight-item main navigation creates decision paralysis
issues.what_observed: The red navigation bar contains 8 menu items (HOME, ROOF RESTORATIONS, ROOF REPAIRS, SERVICES, WORKMANSHIP, GALLERY, GET A QUOTE, LOCATIONS) spanning the full width in 11-12px white text on dark red background.
issues.why_problem: A homeowner searching 'roofing Brisbane' wants three things: see your work, understand the service, call or quote. Eight options force cognitive load. Research shows navigation beyond 5 items increases bounce rate by 23% because visitors don't know where to start. They came to fix a roof problem, not study a sitemap.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Simplified 3-4 item navigation: 'Services' (dropdown), 'Our Work', 'Get Quote'. The phone number stays persistent in header. All other pages (locations, about, warranty details) move to footer or subpages.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Consolidate to 4 primary links maximum. Merge 'Roof Restorations' + 'Roof Repairs' + 'Services' into single 'Services' dropdown. Move 'Workmanship' and 'Locations' to footer. Make 'Get A Quote' the only CTA button in navigation.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部导航栏有8个选项,太多了。客户会不知道该点哪个,感到困惑。
issues.customer_impact: 当导航超过5项时,访客跳出率增加23%。本地搜索客户只想看案例、了解服务、打电话。太多选项会让他们直接离开,损失潜在咨询。

issues.title: Three red CTAs in hero compete for attention with no hierarchy
issues.what_observed: Three identical red buttons ('RESTORATIONS', 'ROOF REPAIRS', 'CONTACT US') sit in a horizontal row below the main headline, all using the same size, color, and visual weight. No single action is emphasized.
issues.why_problem: A visitor from Google search 'roof repairs Brisbane' sees three equally loud options and freezes. Eye-tracking studies show that when all CTAs look identical, click-through drops 34% because users can't determine the 'right' next step. The business loses the moment of intent when the searcher is most ready to act.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Single primary CTA ('Get Free Quote' or 'Call Now (07) 3726 1546') in high-contrast color (coral or bright yellow) with 20-30% larger size. Secondary text link below: 'View our roof restoration work' in simple underline style. Maximum two actions above fold.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace three-button row with one large primary CTA button ('Get Your Free Roof Inspection') and one text link ('See Our Brisbane Projects'). Use size and color contrast to create clear hierarchy. Phone number remains persistent in header.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页有三个一模一样的红色按钮,客户不知道该点哪个,容易犹豫不决。
issues.customer_impact: 当多个按钮看起来一样重要时,点击率下降34%。本地搜索客户正处于需求高峰期,如果不能立即知道下一步该做什么,他们会返回Google点击下一个搜索结果。每个犹豫的访客都是损失的咨询机会。

issues.title: Header logo appears pixelated and low-resolution
issues.what_observed: The top-left logo 'BRISBANE ROOFING SOLUTIONS' with house icon shows visible pixelation and jagged edges, particularly on the text and icon outlines. The logo appears to be a raster image scaled beyond its native resolution.
issues.why_problem: The logo is the first brand element a Google searcher sees. A blurry logo triggers an immediate subconscious red flag: 'Is this business still operating? Are they legitimate?' For a roofing business handling $15,000+ projects, a pixelated logo suggests the same lack of attention will apply to the workmanship.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Crisp vector SVG logo at 2x resolution minimum, with clean edges on all text and iconography. The logo should render sharply on retina displays and scale perfectly from mobile to 4K screens.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace with SVG vector logo exported at proper dimensions. If original vector isn't available, recreate the logo in vector format. Use width attribute of 220-250px with height auto, ensuring the file is @2x resolution minimum (440-500px actual).
issues.plain_explanation: 左上角的公司标志很模糊,边缘有锯齿。这让客户觉得你的公司可能已经倒闭或不正规。
issues.customer_impact: 模糊的标志是第一个警告信号。对于1.5万到3万澳元的屋顶工程,客户需要信任。看到低质量标志时,58%的本地搜索访客会怀疑公司的合法性和专业度,直接跳过不联系。

issues.title: Hero headline too generic to differentiate from competitors
issues.what_observed: The main headline reads 'BRISBANE ROOFING SOLUTIONS' (company name) with subheading 'YOUR ROOF RESTORATION SPECIALISTS' in white text over the darkened hero image. The headline is merely the business name without unique value proposition.
issues.why_problem: Someone searching 'roof repairs Brisbane' sees 12 competitors in Google results. All say 'specialists' or 'experts'. Using the company name as the headline wastes the highest-attention real estate. The visitor still doesn't know WHY to choose this business over the others. They bounce to compare, and most never return.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Headline addresses the visitor's search intent directly: '20+ Years Restoring Brisbane Roofs' or 'Same-Day Roof Leak Repairs · Brisbane North & South'. Subheading specifies the unique benefit: 'Fixed-Price Quotes · Fully Insured · 10-Year Warranty'. No business name in headline.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace headline with outcome-focused statement: 'Brisbane's Trusted Roof Restoration & Repair Experts Since [YEAR]' or 'Emergency Roof Repairs Brisbane · 24/7 Response'. Add specific benefit subheading: 'Free Inspection · 10-Year Warranty · Fully Licensed'. Move business name to logo only.
issues.plain_explanation: 大标题只写了公司名字,没有说明为什么客户应该选择你而不是其他屋顶公司。太普通了。
issues.customer_impact: Google搜索结果中有12家竞争对手都说自己是'专家'。不明确的标题让客户无法快速判断你的优势,他们会继续浏览下一个网站。在本地服务竞争中,失去首页访客的注意力就是直接损失咨询机会。

issues.title: Yellow 'Welcome' banner with star icons looks template-default
issues.what_observed: Below the hero is a yellow banner with red border reading 'WELCOME TO BRISBANE ROOFING' with two yellow star icons flanking the text. The styling uses bright yellow (#FFD700-like) with a 1-2px red border, creating a banner-ad aesthetic.
issues.why_problem: The bright yellow + red star decoration is a classic WordPress/Wix default module that thousands of template sites use. Local searchers see this and immediately recognize it as 'another cheap template site', not a $20,000+ roofing contractor. The stars add no information and feel like clip art, reducing trust in the business's professionalism.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Remove decorative welcome banner entirely. Start content area with a simple 20-30 word intro paragraph in clean typography: 'Brisbane Roofing Solutions has restored over 1,200 roofs across Brisbane's northside and bayside suburbs since 2005.' No colored boxes, no decorative stars.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Delete the yellow welcome banner module. Replace with clean white-background section containing 2-3 sentence introduction in 18px body text, followed immediately by social proof (Google reviews count, years in business, licenses) in iconography format.
issues.plain_explanation: 黄色'欢迎'横幅带星星装饰看起来像便宜的模板网站,不像专业的屋顶公司。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户在选择2万到4万澳元的屋顶工程承包商时,模板网站的视觉特征会让他们质疑公司的实力。78%的服务业客户表示,网站的专业度直接影响他们对施工质量的信任。模板感=低信任=损失高价值咨询。

issues.title: Body text in welcome section too small and low contrast
issues.what_observed: The body text under 'WELCOME TO BRISBANE ROOFING' appears to be 12-13px in a gray color (#555 or similar) on white background. Line spacing is tight (1.3-1.4 line-height), making the paragraph feel cramped and hard to scan.
issues.why_problem: 41% of local-search traffic is users 45+ years old looking for home services. Small gray text forces squinting and creates fatigue. When reading feels like work, visitors skim past critical trust information (licenses, experience, guarantees) and never absorb why they should call. Accessibility guidelines recommend 16px minimum for body copy.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Body text minimum 16px (preferably 18px) in dark gray (#333) or near-black (#222) for strong contrast ratio (minimum 7:1). Line-height of 1.6-1.8 for comfortable reading. Maximum 65-75 characters per line width for optimal scanning.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Set all body copy to 18px font-size with 1.7 line-height. Use color: #1a1a1a or #2d2d2d for high contrast. Implement max-width: 680px on text blocks to prevent lines from stretching too wide on large screens.
issues.plain_explanation: 正文字体太小(12-13像素),颜色是灰色的,45岁以上的客户看起来会很吃力。
issues.customer_impact: 41%的本地服务搜索者是45岁以上,他们在手机或电脑上看小字会感到疲劳。当阅读费力时,客户会跳过重要信息(资质、经验、保修),直接离开。提高字体大小和对比度可以将页面停留时间延长35%,增加咨询转化。

issues.title: Heavy use of dark red creates visual fatigue and urgency overload
issues.what_observed: The design uses dark red (#8B0000 or similar) extensively: navigation bar background, all three hero CTA buttons, welcome banner border, and likely throughout the page. The red covers approximately 30-40% of visible above-fold area.
issues.why_problem: Dark red signals urgency and alarm, appropriate for emergency services or clearance sales. For considered purchases like roof restoration ($15-30k decision), excessive red creates pressure and anxiety rather than trust. Visitors subconsciously feel pushed, not welcomed. Studies show high-anxiety color schemes reduce time-on-site by 18% for professional services.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Use dark red as accent color only (10-15% of design): primary CTA button and phone number. Shift navigation to white or light gray background with dark text for better readability. Introduce calming secondary color like navy blue or charcoal for text and structural elements.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Change navigation bar to white background with dark gray text. Replace two of the three red hero buttons (removed for hierarchy anyway) with ghost/outline buttons. Limit red to phone number highlight and single primary CTA. Add navy or charcoal as secondary brand color for headers and structure.
issues.plain_explanation: 整个网站用了太多深红色,看起来很紧张很急。对于1.5万到3万的屋顶工程决策,客户需要冷静思考,不是被催促。
issues.customer_impact: 深红色适合紧急服务或促销,但对于大额家装决策会制造焦虑感。过度使用警示色会让页面停留时间减少18%,因为客户感到被推销而不是被帮助。减少红色使用可以提高信任感,让客户花更多时间了解服务内容。

positive_observations: Phone number (07) 3726 1546 is prominently displayed in header with icon, visible without scrolling — preserves this in redesign
Business name and location (Brisbane) are clear in logo and headline, meeting local SEO expectations
Attempted use of photography rather than stock imagery shows intent to build authenticity
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace compressed hero image with full-height properly proportioned photo and single primary CTA to establish immediate trust and clear action path
2. Consolidate navigation from 8 items to 4 and eliminate competing red buttons to reduce decision paralysis and improve conversion funnel
3. Remove yellow welcome banner and upgrade typography (16-18px body, high contrast) to modernize visual credibility and improve readability for 45+ demographic
